mapper.select: SELECT category_id AS id, category_name AS categoryName, board_code AS boardCode, is_deleted AS isDeleted FROM category WHERE board_code = #{boardCode} AND (is_deleted = 0 OR is_deleted IS NULL) ORDER BY category_name
mapper.insert: INSERT INTO category (category_name, board_code, is_deleted) VALUES (#{categoryName}, #{boardCode}, 0)
